##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/taskHistory/{billId} 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/taskHistory/{billId} 
 ## 接口描述 
根据单据id查询单据审批历史记录 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: GET  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":false,"label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"nodeId","required":false,"label":"%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9Id","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"nodeName","required":false,"label":"%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"futureNode","required":false,"label":"%E6%9C%AA%E6%9D%A5%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9id","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"nodeType","required":false,"label":"%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"type","required":false,"label":"%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"START","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"subType","required":false,"label":"%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E5%AD%90%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"actionType","required":false,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"completeCondition","required":false,"label":"%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6","exampleValue":"","desc":""}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"DATE","name":"startTime","required":false,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"actions","required":false,"label":"%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"userId","required":false,"label":"%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7Id","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"userName","required":false,"label":"%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"userNumber","required":false,"label":"%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empThirdPartId","required":false,"label":"%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"action","required":false,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E8%A1%8C%E4%B8%BA","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"comment","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"DATE","name":"finishTime","required":false,"label":"%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"taskId","required":false,"label":"%E4%BB%BB%E5%8A%A1Id","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"id","required":false,"label":"ID","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"approveSignature","required":false,"label":"%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E7%AD%BE%E5%90%8D","exampleValue":"","desc":""}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"commentList","required":false,"label":"%E8%AF%84%E8%AE%BA%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[]}],"open":false},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable>
